calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appeared on behalf of the plaintiff. Carlos Cordova, self-represented defendant, also appeared together with court appointed Spanish interpreter, Patrice Binaisa(301593). At the request of Plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 09,2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
